title: Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada: Research, Policy and Practice - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada: Research, Policy and Practice
- Information for authors

## Coming in late 2027: A new scientific journal
The Public Health Agency of Canada will launch a new scientific journal offering a single, comprehensive platform that will showcase the full spectrum of public health research, including health promotion and chronic and communicable disease prevention and control. More information will be available in the coming months!
Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada: Research, Policy and Practice (the HPCDP Journal) is a bilingual, peer-reviewed scientific journal published by the Public Health Agency of Canada’s Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention Branch. Learn more about the HPCDP Journal .
ISSN 2368-738X (Online)
Volume 46 · Number 5 · May 2026

## Updates and Announcements
The  Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada (HPCDP) Journal is no  longer accepting new manuscript submissions.
The  Journal will publish its final issue in Fall 2026. Manuscripts currently under  review will continue to be processed in accordance with established editorial  standards and timelines.
The  Public Health Agency of Canada is undertaking an evolution of its scholarly  publishing activities. Importantly, the new journal will continue to publish  research related to health promotion and chronic disease prevention in Canada,  alongside other priority public health topics.
We  thank our authors, reviewers and readers for their longstanding contributions  to HPCDP Journal and for advancing public health scholarship in Canada and  internationally.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
